title: Atsushi and Atsumi
overview: As Atsushi prepares for a recorder exam, his appearance to others leads him into a tough situation when he tries to talk to one of his classmates.

title: Everyday with Atsumi
overview: Atsumi takes Atsushi shopping with her.

title: Sayo and Atsumi
overview: Sayo and Atsumi discuss what kind of guys they like.

title: Atsushi and Primary School
overview: Atsushi's elementary school teacher, Futami Moriyama, has problems dealing with Atsushi. Later, being with Hina, Atsushi has a run-in with authorities again.

title: Atsushi and Setsubun
overview: Atsushi has to dress up as demon for the winter solstice bean throwing. Atsushi is proving to be a very good demon, almost too good.

title: Atsushi and Chocolates
overview: Atsushi receives a lot of chocolate from the other girls on Valentine's Day.

title: Movie and Misunderstanding
overview: Sayo goes to the movies with Atsumi and Atsushi, unaware that Atsushi is Atsumi's little brother.

title: Atsushi and Hinamatsuri
overview: Atsushi is invited to Hina's house for Hinamatsuri, but is turned away by her suspicious parents.

title: Take-nii and Employment
overview: Atsushi and Atsumi's neighbour, Take, comes over after breaking up with his girlfriend and quitting his job.

title: Atsushi and White Day
overview: Atsushi gets help from Atsumi to make some gifts for White Day.

title: Atsushi and the Library
overview: Atsushi tries to do his homework at the library, where he encounters Sayo again.

title: Atsushi and Misunderstanding
overview: Atsushi faces yet more misunderstandings with the police.

title: Cherry Blossom Viewing with Older Sister and Little Brother
overview: Atsushi and Atsumi stumble upon a Ms. Moriyama, who is very drunk; she takes this opportunity to express some feelings with Atsushi

title: New Students and Misunderstandings
overview: As a new school year starts, both Atsushi and Atsumi face misunderstandings with the new batch of students.

title: Atsushi and Bicycles
overview: Atsushi's friends try to teach him how to ride a bike without training wheels.

title: Atsushi and Dreams
overview: Atsushi and Atsumi think about what they want to do in the future.

title: Snacks and Cheering
overview: As Atsumi ends up making too many snacks for Atsushi and his friends, she invites over Sayo, who continues to misunderstand who Atsushi really is.

title: Family and Hot Springs
overview: Atsushi, Atsumi and their family go to a hot spring inn where Atsumi's height becomes a bother for her.

title: Atsushi and the Sports Festival, Part 1
overview: Atsumi has to act as Atsushi's parent so he can participate in his school's sports festival.

title: Atsushi and the Sports Festival, Part 2
overview: Atsushi and Atsumi have lunch with Sayo before participating in a relay race.

title: Misunderstanding and Truth
overview: Sayo learns the truth that Atsushi is Atsumi's little brother.

title: Atsushi and Hand-Me-Downs
overview: Atsushi wears some clothes handed down from Take, which prove to be a bit controversial.

title: Atsushi and Culture Fairs
overview: Atsushi and his friends go to Atsumi's school culture festival where he runs into Sayo.

title: Big Sister and Little Sister
overview: Sayo mentions to Atsumi she has always wanted a little sister.

title: Atsushi and Chases
overview: A game of hide and seek soon turns into a frantic escape from the cops for Atsushi.

title: Atsushi and Bye-Byes
overview: Atsushi joins Atsumi and Sayo to a family restaurant.

title: Recorder and Randsell Mi★
overview: Atsushi is taken to meet a new police recruit, Aono, before going to the arcades with his friends.

title: Sayo and Shelter from the Rain
overview: Sayo and Hina briefly stop by Atsushi's house to shelter from the rain.

title: Inborn Nature and Illegality
overview: Atsumi has to deal with the similarly short Kobayashi and perverted lolicon Yoshioka.

title: Atsushi and the Student Teacher, Miss Kawauchi
overview: The new student teacher, Miss Kawauchi, tries to make a move on Atsushi...

title: Atsushi and the White-Spotted Longhorn Beetle
overview: Sayo is stressing over the feelings she has for Atsushi that never reach him, when suddenly...

title: Take and Job Hunting
overview: The next-door neighbor, Take, has a tendency to quit jobs as soon as his workplaces romances go awry. But today, something is different...

title: Tiny and Days of Anguish
overview: After constantly suffering at the whims of Yoshioka, Makoto Kobayashi - also known as Tiny - finally resorts to his trump card...

title: Soul Brothers and Real Brothers
overview: As if Yoshioka weren't enough of a handful, now it turns out he's Atsushi's brother?! Another unexpected new character joins the mix, bringing further chaos to the Miyagawa family and friends...

title: Shaky Loves and Horror! A Midsummer's Nightmare!!
overview: The whole gang decides to check out a haunted house, each with their own high expectations. Thrilling and chilling developments only accelerate the chaos...

title: Everyone and Summer Vacation - AM
overview: Some lazy, some efficient... everyone handles summer vacation in their own way. Where good things happen, so shall bad things as well...

title: Everyone and Summer Vacation - PM
overview: Something good always happens in the wake of something bad? Don't assume summer vacation will last forever.

title: Mi is for Me and You and Everyone
overview: Will any conclusion be reached among these supremely chaotic relationships? Or has nothing changed at all? No, no, perhaps the changes just aren't visible...
